best_match.name: Crew Cut
best_match.reason: Enhances facial symmetry while being easy to maintain.

good_options.name: French Crop
good_options.reason: Works well with straight hair for a clean look.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: Offers a classic look with a modern twist.

not_recommended.name: Man Bun
not_recommended.reason: Requires longer hair and may not suit face shape.

not_recommended.name: Mohawk
not_recommended.reason: Too edgy and contrasts with a youthful vibe.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: Not optimal for a round face shape.

analysis.parting_recommendation: A side part enhances facial features and adds elegance.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Opt for a light fringe to keep it balanced and open up the face.

length_options.medium_verdict: Good choice for versatility and style.
length_options.long_verdict: Not recommended for current style preference.

analysis.summary: The ideal style is a Crew Cut, which complements the facial structure and is easy to maintain. Avoid longer styles that may detract from facial balance. Ash and cool tones in color are recommended for harmony with personal color palette.
care_tips: Use a nourishing conditioner to maintain hair texture.
Trim every 4-6 weeks to keep the shape.
Use a light styling product for a neat finish.
